question:
Each zumpus is not wooden. Every zumpus is a vumpus. Every vumpus is not sour. Every vumpus is a jompus. Every jompus is floral. Each jompus is a wumpus. Every wumpus is transparent. Wumpuses are impuses. Impuses are dull. Every impus is a yumpus. Each yumpus is feisty. Numpuses are not orange. Every yumpus is a dumpus. Dumpuses are orange. Each dumpus is a rompus. Each rompus is not aggressive. Rompuses are tumpuses. Fae is a jompus.

Is the following statement true or false? Fae is orange.
